Vary Your Tone of Voice ‘When you tak to the players, make it clear whether you're talking as Referee, The Com puter, Narrator, or NPC. Paranoia is a game of tone, and each gamemaster role has its 
‘The Referee has an exaggerated sincerity and concer for faimess and impartial interpreta tion and application of the rules. To the players, this means that they are going to be hosed and there is nothing they can do about it except look cheerful
